sources.title: The Colony 2013 Dvdrip Xvid( R)
sources.description: Forced underground by the next ice age, a struggling outpost of survivors must fight to preserve humanity against a threat even more savage than nature.

metadata.Plot: Groups of people - colonies - are forced underground due to another ice age. Colony 7 goes to check on Colony 5, which they lost contact with. When they get there they find that the colony has fallen and there is a whole new enemy that they have to face on their way back.
metadata.Writer: Jeff Renfroe, Svet Rouskov, Patrick Tarr
metadata.Actors: Kevin Zegers, Laurence Fishburne, Bill Paxton
